title: Visibility filter for widgets
excerpt: It would be incredibly powerful to have the ability to filter the visibility of widgets in dashboards to either make them either visible or invisible. If you were to add a similar filter like we currently have for boards…

posts.author: samato (Sean Amato)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be incredibly powerful to have the ability to filter the visibility of widgets in dashboards to either make them either visible or invisible. If you were to add a similar filter like we currently have for boards, including the ability to filter the widget visibility based on column values, people, teams, etc., it could open up a tremendous number of possibilities for reporting.
